recovery_method: verbatim transcript extraction in BYTE MODE (R20)
extractor_byte_mode_note: Round-1 fix per Codex: extractor reads transcript via .read_bytes() and uses a byte regex (rb prefix). Bodies are the exact captured byte slice; offsets are true byte offsets; SHA256s are over raw bytes — no text-mode normalisation, no errors='replace' substitution.

source_transcript.review_verdict_inline: 1 silent run on this transcript (per shared memory project_agen_five_agent_state_2026-06-07.md). Silent-twice clock is functionally reset because the prior silent run was on the deleted clones-path artifacts; a re-review on the restored live-path artifacts is a separate doctrine question logged as known residual in SPEC-ANIM-08 §13.

src_path_in_transcript_note: Transcript marker paths reference apex/registry/clones/code-artifacts/AGENT_BUILD_SYSTEM/07_VERIFICATION_AGENT/ (the deprecated clones working copy from the May build). Bodies are restored to the live path AGENT_BUILD_SYSTEM/07_VERIFICATION_AGENT/ byte-for-byte. Per shared memory, the clones path was a sibling working copy of the live path during the May build; content is identical.

preserved_files_not_overwritten.reason: Already present at live path (2026-04-19 mtime); skipped per SPEC-ANIM-08 §3 to avoid destructive overwrite.

validation.live_sha_check_method: All 5 transcript_byte_range slices are written to disk via .write_bytes() unchanged. Live SHA256 (hashlib.sha256 over raw bytes) equals the slice SHA256 above by construction.
validation.sha_drift_warning: git autocrlf may convert LF→CRLF on Windows checkout. Committed blob bytes match the SHAs above (LF preserved in the index by write_bytes()); a re-checkout on a Windows worktree with autocrlf=true may produce a working-tree file whose bytes-on-disk-after-checkout differ from the committed blob. Verbatim integrity is preserved at the blob (commit) level — Codex bundles will reflect the committed bytes.

doctrine_anchors.R20: Verbatim recovery — every byte written matches the transcript byte slice. The extractor uses .read_bytes() + byte-regex + .write_bytes(); no encoding/newline normalisation.
doctrine_anchors.R19: EXTEND of a prior build via verbatim restore from authoritative transcript (not greenfield). Decision recorded here.
doctrine_anchors.WO_clause_3: Recovery from Codex review transcripts (verbatim recovery, not invention), then commit + PR this time.

known_residuals: Silent-twice clock for the AGEN-Verification agent itself is functionally reset — see SPEC-ANIM-08 §13 + [[project_agen_five_agent_state_2026-06-07]]. ANIM-08 cert covers restore-correctness only.
